title: PNC Corporate Overview
note: Primary company overview for PNC's retail banking, corporate and institutional banking, asset management, branch, ATM, and client-reach descriptions.

title: PNC 2024 Form 10-K
note: Annual-report source for PNC's business segments, financial performance, balance sheet context, and risk factors.

title: PNC Financial Services Market Capitalization
note: Market-cap reference used for the registry snapshot and company market-cap metric.

title: The PNC Financial Services Group Statistics and Valuation
note: Valuation reference for late-May 2026 market capitalization and trailing P/E ratio.

title: PNC Treasury Management
note: Product page for PNC's corporate treasury-management and payment-service positioning.

title: Apache Fineract
note: Open-source core banking platform used as a plausible banking-infrastructure alternative.

title: apache/fineract
note: Public source repository for Apache Fineract.

title: Mifos X
note: Open-source financial-inclusion banking stack associated with Apache Fineract and core banking workflows.

title: Fineract Core Banking Solutions
note: Implementation-oriented source describing Fineract and Mifos X as open-source core banking alternatives with license-cost and lock-in advantages.

title: Open Bank Project
note: Open-banking API platform source for bank-as-a-platform and open-finance interoperability concepts.

title: OpenBankProject/OBP-API
note: Public repository for Open Bank Project's RESTful banking API platform.

title: OpenACH
note: Open-source ACH origination and payment-processing project used as a treasury-management alternative.

title: Mojaloop
note: Open-source interoperable payment-system software relevant to federated treasury and payment-switch concepts.

title: mojaloop GitHub Organization
note: Public source repositories for the Mojaloop open-source payment ecosystem.
